title: What would an Uber Evil Shinji do
display_title: What would an Uber Evil Shinji do
wikitext:
[]: What would an 'Uber-Evil Shinji' do?             Quote Post by pat457 » Sun Jul 27, 2008 8:46 am (NOTE: I came up with the idea for this thread upon traversing around the vast resource that is the Internet and seeing a Japanese thread on 2channel discussing the same thing...with posts and ideas ranging from the mundane, to the humorous, even to the downright disturbing. I'll admit I've lifted my ideas below from there, albeit with major 'tweakings', of course) What if the boy known as Ikari Shinji was an evil, rude, ruthless, inconsiderate, arrogant guy? What do you think he would do or say? 1.) As the Angel Sachiel continues strolling upon Tokyo-3, Shinji refuses to obey his father Gendo's commands to pilot EVA-01. Finally, seeing that Shinji won't budge, Gendo sends for the pilot Rei Ayanami, despite her injuries. She is then wheeled into the room in a hospital bed, still covered with bandages. Shinji, upon seeing her, thinks of a single question in his mind: Can't I run away? Can't I run away? Can't I run away? Can't I run away? Can't I run away!? Finally, he makes a resolution in his mind, and announces it for all to hear: " I'M GOING...I'm going home!! " 2.) GENDO: Evangelion Unit 03 will be abandoned at this time. It will be designated as the 13th Angel. Shinji, destroy the target. Shinji: "Roger. Toji, you damned Angel, DIIIEEEEEE!!!!" (EVA-01 attacks EVA-03 with such violence that it would probably be censored if broadcast on-air) SHIGERU: ...The target has gone completely silent! (A recovery team fetches Toji out of the now-damaged-beyond-repair EVA-03.) RECOVERY TEAM: Both of the pilot's legs and left arm are severed, along with a ruptured spleen and cranium; both breathing and pulse have stopped completely! Shinji: What? He's dead? Oh well, it's not like it wasn't inevitable. But at least I've got the job done, eh, pops? GENDO: (Feeling uneasy) Uh...yeah...

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Sun Jul 27, 2008 9:31 am And if Shinji did feel bad about the whole Toji/Unit 3 incident, he wouldn't just whine "Don't push me!" and do nothing. Shinji would mess up NERV pretty bad. If you had an renegade Eva in NERV for the five minutes of battery time it would have, well, it would be analogous to the proverbial "bull in a china shop," at the very least. Also, Asuka would have a lot less fun teasing him.

[]:             Quote Post by pat457 » Sun Jul 27, 2008 9:36 am Gamer_2k4 wrote: And if Shinji did feel bad about the whole Toji/Unit 3 incident, he wouldn't just whine "Don't push me!" and do nothing. Shinji would mess up NERV pretty bad. If you had an renegade Eva in NERV for the five minutes of battery time it would have, well, it would be analogous to the proverbial "bull in a china shop," at the very least.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Sun Jul 27, 2008 9:41 am So what you're basically asking is: "What if Shinji were Gendo?" I'm imagining he'd go to Asuka at least once and say "STFU bitch"

[]:             Quote Post by pat457 » Sun Jul 27, 2008 9:43 am master_lloyd wrote: So what you're basically asking is: "What if Shinji were Gendo?"

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sun Jul 27, 2008 11:10 am And if Shinji did feel bad about the whole Toji/Unit 3 incident, he wouldn't just whine "Don't push me!" and do nothing. Shinji would mess up NERV pretty bad. If you had an renegade Eva in NERV for the five minutes of battery time it would have, well, it would be analogous to the proverbial "bull in a china shop," at the very least.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Sun Jul 27, 2008 11:21 am master_lloyd wrote: So what you're basically asking is: "What if Shinji were Gendo?"

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Jul 27, 2008 11:31 am If Shinji were Teh Uber Evil, he would've done a lot more than just fapping in that hopsital room.

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Sun Jul 27, 2008 12:44 pm You want uber evil Shinji? I've seen Evangelion/Warhammer 40k crossovers. You can't get more evil than Shinji working for a Chaos god.

[]: Yes this is meant to be stupid/distrubing             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jul 27, 2008 12:46 pm pat457 wrote: What if the boy known as Ikari Shinji was an evil, rude, ruthless, inconsiderate, arrogant guy?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Jul 27, 2008 12:48 pm Formless One wrote: You want uber evil Shinji? I've seen Evangelion/Warhammer 40k crossovers. You can't get more evil than Shinji working for a Chaos god.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sun Jul 27, 2008 12:49 pm Visions of Shinji going to Terminal Dogma, killing his father, and using Rei for his own purposes come to mind...

[]: Re: Yes this is meant to be stupid/distrubing             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Jul 27, 2008 12:51 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Sachi_13 wrote: If Shinji were Teh Uber Evil, he would've done a lot more than just fapping in that hopsital room.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Sun Jul 27, 2008 12:52 pm SSD wins. BIG TIME.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jul 27, 2008 1:12 pm master_lloyd wrote: SSD wins. BIG TIME.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Sun Jul 27, 2008 1:38 pm I'd say Shinji'd go around beating and killing everything he could and then rape any decent looking female around, while listening to classical music. Then Gendo would have those guys in black arrest him and force him to watch a bunch of movies while strapped to a chair with his eyes held open.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sun Jul 27, 2008 2:16 pm SSD wins. BIG TIME.

[]: Everybody needs silliness once in a while             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jul 27, 2008 2:59 pm Iron Rooster: I was waiting for somebody to make that reference. I debated on doing so myself then decided against it. Hal wrote: though you forgot

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Sun Jul 27, 2008 3:02 pm Misato... O_O Shinji: Just say when.....

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun Jul 27, 2008 3:25 pm What would an 'Uber-Evil Shinji' do?
